productDisplayName: Peter England Men Elements Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet holder from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic piece.Dimensions: 10.3 cm x 9.6 cmTwo main compartmentsThree credit card slots on the left side of the wallet and four on the rightTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideBranding embossed on the frontContrast coloured innerCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
